# Lesson plan <span class="badge badge-draft1">✎ Very rough draft</span>

```{r}
#| include: false
if(file.exists("../_setup.R")){source("../_setup.R")}
```

## Overview

- Suggested lesson plan for teaching trustworthiness assessment using this book

## Larger practice exercises

- Foody et al. (2013)
- Vahey et al. (2015)
- "This Is The Worst Article Ever Written"
